prestazioni: Engine: M275 E60 AL (6.0L V12 Biturbo) – Full internal build with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded to a custom Weistec Engineering Stage 4+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with 76mm billet compressor wheels, Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, and a custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system with PWR Racing heat exchangers.

Fuel System: Full upgrade to a dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump setup with a Radium Engineering surge tank, ID1700x injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel capability. Custom Weistec Engineering port injection system with secondary injectors for methanol/water injection (AEM 340LPH pump) to manage E85 blends and prevent detonation at 1,200+ HP targets.

Drivetrain & Chassis: Weistec Engineering CL65-specific 7-speed automatic transmission reinforcement kit with a billet torque converter (4,500+ stall), upgraded valve body, and a Quaife ATB differential. KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts, and custom valving for the CL65’s air suspension delete. AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Body: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem CL65 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon weave accents. Custom front splitter with integrated canards from Varis Japan, and a carbon fiber GT-style rear wing from Seibon Carbon with adjustable angle mounts.

Wheels & Aero: HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels in 20x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET40 (rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 and 325/25/21). Custom carbon fiber diffuser from RW Carbon with integrated exhaust cutouts for a dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system from Akrapovic (full titanium construction with carbon tips).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather with red contrast stitching, including door cards, headliner, and dashboard. Custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (bolt-in, 6-point with harness bar) wrapped in Alcantara. Sparco Pro 2000 seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom Motec C127 dash display replacing the stock cluster.
